title: lactuca perennis subsp. tenerrima
intro: Lactuca perennis subsp. tenerrima, also known as the perennial wild lettuce or annual wild lettuce, is a subspecies of wild lettuce that belongs to the dandelion and lettuce family Asteraceae. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce pain. The health benefits of Lactuca perennis subsp. tenerrima include its ability to aid in sleep, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
